question: Terminal raw/readout-aware + FFT/least-squares review for refreshed-center r03 det=1.5 MHz long-span Ramsey/T2star/13C follow-up.

protocol_basis.axis_contract_check: ExperimentDataEachAvg axis verified by averaging per-average readout axis back to ExperimentData.

summary_stats.readout_roles: ramsey.xml full_experiment=0: readout1 reference, readout2 Ramsey signal; sequence/manifest validated for one-dimensional tau scan.

interpretation.terminal_caveat: Terminal savedexperiment review. Stored averages help expose drift/tracking cadence but are not strong independent repeatability proof by themselves.
interpretation.axis_contract_check: ExperimentDataEachAvg verified by averaging per-average readout axis back to ExperimentData before SEM/per-average use.
interpretation.full_view_read: Full-span ratio LS screen top is 2.266 MHz; programmed 1.5 MHz carrier amplitude is 0.01575 ratio / 0.705 kcps raw-signal; expected 13C sideband ratio amplitudes are 0.00278/0.00962.
interpretation.skip_transient_read: After skipping the first 4 tau points, ratio LS screen top is 2.266 MHz; programmed carrier ratio amplitude is 0.01231. After skipping 8 points, top is 2.276 MHz; programmed carrier ratio amplitude is 0.01226.
interpretation.sem_context: Median signal SEM across tau is 0.850 kcps; LS raw carrier amplitude is 0.705 kcps, so single-point visual contrast is modest and must be judged by coherent shape/controls rather than one point.
interpretation.agent_decision_placeholder: Use this terminal review with prior Ramsey branches to decide whether a numeric T2star fit is supported, whether 13C sidebands are supported, or whether the r03 Ramsey route should close as unsupported/negative under current conditions.

drift.reference_method: single-average raw readout common-mode; no cross-average reference
drift.trace_aggregation_method: mean normalized raw brightness across selected readout traces
drift.drift_score_method: max(0, -linear end-minus-start of per-average common-mode raw brightness in acquisition order when scan-order metadata exists)
drift.data_order_for_score: acquisition order if ScanOrderEachAvg is available; stored tau order otherwise
